title: AI Trading Agents for Self-Directed Investors — Try Them Free for 14 Days
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
# HOUSTON - Dec. 26, 2025 - PRLog -- Key Takeaways

* [Tickeron’s AI Trading Agents](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/virtualagents/all/) generate multiple daily trade ideas across **Stocks, ETFs, and Crypto**, delivering real-time buy and sell signals.
* Newly released **5-minute and 15-minute Agents**, powered by upgraded Financial Learning Models (FLMs), respond up to **30% faster** to market volatility.
* A seasonal promotion offers **up to 75% off**, with pricing starting at **$5/month** for signals and **$45/month** for unlimited AI Robots.
* With the S&P 500 hovering near record highs and the Santa Claus rally historically appearing in nearly **80% of the past 50 years**, AI tools help traders navigate thin holiday liquidity and surging commodities like gold, silver, and copper.

# Empowering DIY Traders with AI-Driven Automation

Tickeron, a leader in AI-powered financial technology, has enhanced its suite of **AI Trading Agents** designed specifically for do-it-yourself investors. These agents automate trading strategies using machine learning while maintaining transparency and control.  
Users can choose from **Signal Agents** for streamlined copy trading, **Virtual Agents** with customizable account balances, or **Brokerage Agents** operating on tick-level data. Built-in risk management allows traders to execute sophisticated strategies without the complexity or high costs typically associated with institutional tools.

# Smarter Trading with Predictions, Patterns, and Real-Time AI

Tickeron’s ecosystem includes advanced analytics such as the **AI Trend Prediction Engine**, which delivers entry and exit levels along with confidence scores within minutes. The **AI Pattern Search Engine** scans for end-of-day formations, breakouts, and price targets supported by historical backtesting.  
Meanwhile, **Real-Time Patterns** dynamically track intraday setups and calculate success probabilities using live market data. Expanded computing power has accelerated FLM learning cycles, enabling the launch of new **5-minute and 15-minute Agents** built for fast-moving markets.

# AI Robots Built for Speed, Simplicity, and Results

Tickeron’s AI Robots—ranging from beginner-friendly systems to high-win-rate automated strategies—make it easy to trade with confidence. These robots support effortless copy trading, instant alerts, and adaptive execution.  
As U.S. futures stabilize following the holiday period and the traditional Santa Claus rally remains intact, Tickeron’s AI tools help traders identify opportunities across equities, ETFs, and commodities, including recent strength in precious metals.

# The CEO’s Perspective on AI-Powered Trading

Sergey Savastiouk, Ph.D., CEO of Tickeron, emphasizes that technical analysis remains essential in volatile markets—and AI significantly amplifies its effectiveness. By combining Financial Learning Models with proven technical frameworks, Tickeron enables traders to recognize patterns more accurately and act with greater confidence. From entry-level robots to high-liquidity stock agents, Tickeron delivers real-time insights designed to improve transparency, control, and decision-making speed in today’s markets.
